basics.name: Shubham Soniminde
basics.label: Product Manager
basics.tagline: From ambiguity to execution — building products that deliver impact with the help of AI
basics.ctaPitch: Looking for an AI-first PM who moves fast and builds smarter? Let's talk.
basics.summary: Experienced Product Manager with a proven track record in driving product strategy, optimizing performance through data-driven insights, and leading cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact features in the gaming and edtech sectors.

metrics.label: Team Size Managed
metrics.description: Cross-functional team across product, engineering, and design

metrics.label: Years Product Leadership
metrics.description: Driving strategy, roadmaps, and delivery across gaming & edtech

metrics.label: App Performance Boost
metrics.description: Introduced features that measurably improved app performance

metrics.label: QoQ Revenue Impact
metrics.description: Delivered product features driving quarterly revenue gains

metrics.label: Agents Built with Kiro
metrics.description: Built multiple AI agents to automate SDLC workflows

metrics.label: Regulatory Alignment
metrics.description: Across all US jurisdictions in gaming products

highlights: Defined and executed product strategy & roadmaps, aligning with business goals and prioritizing high-impact features
Drove end-to-end product delivery, collaborating with engineering, design, compliance, and marketing teams
Optimized product performance by monitoring KPIs and running A/B tests, leading to 50%+ performance boost
Embedded compliance & responsible gaming principles, ensuring 100% regulatory alignment across jurisdictions
Leveraged Amazon Q & Kiro to integrate workflows across Jira, Confluence, and Figma via MCPs
Delivered features driving $1.5M+ QoQ revenue gains through innovative solution architecture
Suggested product enhancements based on customer insights to improve UX
Coordinated with engineering to deliver functional solutions; developed PRDs and BRDs
Conducted research to identify customer needs and market gaps
Prioritized feature implementation and set specific timelines
Liaised with Marketing for proper positioning of new products/features
Worked cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing, and Sales teams
Analyzed edtech industry for campaign insights; created PRDs for product strategy refinement
Developed efficient customer communication and feedback channels
Trained internal departments on new product features
Developed strategies to drive qualified traffic and brand awareness
Deployed marketing campaigns end-to-end from ideation to execution
Built strategic relationships with key industry players and vendors
Measured and reported on campaign performance against goals
Conducted market research to identify new opportunities
Created reports on marketing and sales metrics including conversion rates
Monitored competitors' marketing activities

projects.title: Transaction History Phase 1
projects.description: Led the design and launch of an enhanced transaction visibility feature across all US gaming labels. Delivered comprehensive transaction records for casino, sports betting, deposits, and withdrawals.
projects.impact: Reduced support tickets by 35%, cut regulatory inquiry response time by 60%, projected $2.3M annual savings.

projects.title: Casino Wallet & Transaction Architecture
projects.description: Defined product requirements for the PPAC platform's casino transaction flow and wallet management system with jurisdiction-specific rules.
projects.impact: 100% regulatory alignment across jurisdictions, multi-vendor support, scalable architecture for market expansion.

projects.title: AI-Powered SDLC Optimization
projects.description: Integrated Amazon Q & Kiro across the product development lifecycle, connecting Jira, Confluence, and Figma workflows via MCPs. Built AI agents for sprint reporting and cross-functional collaboration.
projects.impact: Reduced project turnaround times and streamlined collaboration across engineering, design, and product teams.

projects.title: Uncovering Growth Opportunities at Instagram
projects.description: Analyzed Instagram's growth loops to identify expansion opportunities. Proposed 5 epics using RICE framework.
projects.impact: Top-scored Epic 1 (Streamline External Sharing, 8.0) and Epic 4 (Algorithm Personalization, 7.5).

projects.title: Personalized Learning Recommendation System
projects.description: Designed a hybrid recommendation system combining collaborative filtering, content-based, and knowledge-based approaches.
projects.impact: Targeted 25% engagement increase, 30% completion improvement, 20% satisfaction boost.

projects.title: Fitness App — 1-Pager Brief & Wireframes
projects.description: Created a comprehensive 1-pager product brief and low-fidelity wireframes for a personalized fitness app.
projects.impact: Targeted 50% DAU increase, 70% retention after 3 months, 4.5-star app store rating.

projects.title: Gaana — Root Cause Analysis
projects.description: Investigated the decline of Gaana's App Store rating. Conducted ratings analysis, user journey mapping, and competitive benchmarking.
projects.impact: Identified root causes and proposed targeted fixes for technical issues, UX improvements, and subscription clarity.

projects.title: Rapido — Supply Growth & Driver Safety
projects.description: Conducted primary user research with Rapido bike taxi drivers to understand supply growth challenges.
projects.impact: Proposed 3 research-led product solutions: safety cameras, SOS button, and driver training programs.
